name: Motive Fleet Management API
what_it_does: Motive (formerly KeepTruckin) REST API for fleet management and compliance platform focused on trucking and logistics. Enables AI agents to query vehicle location and telematics data, retrieve Hours of Service (HOS) logs, access driver safety scores, retrieve DVIR inspection reports, and integrate Motive fleet data into logistics and safety workflows. Motive is a leading ELD (Electronic Logging Device) provider.
use_cases: Querying real-time vehicle location and trip data from logistics coordination agents
Retrieving Hours of Service compliance data from DOT compliance monitoring agents
Accessing driver safety scores and event data from fleet safety agents
Integrating Motive telematics data into dispatch and routing workflow agents
not_for: Unauthorized driver monitoring without fleet authority and disclosure
best_when: A trucking or logistics company using Motive for fleet management and ELD compliance wants AI agents to monitor driver safety, track HOS compliance, and integrate fleet data into dispatch workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver location and HOS data are subject to employment law. Disclosure requirements apply. DOT regulations govern ELD data access and use. AUTHORIZED FLEET USE ONLY.

auth.notes: Motive API uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow. Developer app registration at developer.gomotive.com. Scopes cover vehicles, drivers, HOS, and safety data.

pricing.paid_tiers: Fleet management subscription per vehicle per month
pricing.notes: Fleet management subscription required for API access. Pricing per vehicle per month.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver HOS and location data subject to DOT regulations and employment law
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API required
ELD data has strict regulatory requirements — any data modifications or reporting errors can be DOT violations
HOS data is time-sensitive — use appropriate polling intervals for compliance monitoring
Driver DVIR reports contain safety-critical vehicle defect information — handle with appropriate urgency
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver HOS and location data. SOC2, DOT compliance. OAuth2 with scopes. US-focused fleet telematics.

security_score_components.security_notes: Driver HOS and location data. SOC2, DOT. OAuth2 with scopes. Employment law disclosure required.
